'''gahacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thabilitho|thabilitho]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thabilitho|thabilitho]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gahacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhæchæth|gæhæchæth]] || [[word:gæhæchæj|gæhæchæj]] || [[word:gæhæchæsh|gæhæchæsh]] || [[word:gæhæchæ|gæhæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahahachath|gahahachath]] || [[word:gahahachaj|gahahachaj]] || [[word:gahahachash|gahahachash]] || [[word:gahahacha|gahahacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahachath|gahachath]] || [[word:gahachaj|gahachaj]] || [[word:gahachash|gahachash]] || [[word:gahacha|gahacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahafchath|gahafchath]] || [[word:gahafchaj|gahafchaj]] || [[word:gahafchash|gahafchash]] || [[word:gahafchaf|gahafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahachatha|gahachatha]] || [[word:gahachaja|gahachaja]] || [[word:gahachasha|gahachasha]] || [[word:gahachaka|gahachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahachath|gahachath]] || [[word:gahachaj|gahachaj]] || [[word:gahachash|gahachash]] || [[word:gahacha|gahacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahachathal|gahachathal]] || [[word:gahachajal|gahachajal]] || [[word:gahachashal|gahachashal]] || [[word:gahachakal|gahachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahachathatha|gahachathatha]] || [[word:gahachajaja|gahachajaja]] || [[word:gahachashasha|gahachashasha]] || [[word:gahachaka|gahachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahachathan|gahachathan]] || [[word:gahachajan|gahachajan]] || [[word:gahachashan|gahachashan]] || [[word:gahachakan|gahachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahachathaoro|gahachathaoro]] || [[word:gahachajaoro|gahachajaoro]] || [[word:gahachashaoro|gahachashaoro]] || [[word:gahachakaoro|gahachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
